scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @run-walk-coach/shared build && concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,green "pnpm --filter @run-walk-coach/api dev" "pnpm --filter @run-walk-coach/web dev"
scripts.lint: pnpm --filter @run-walk-coach/shared build && pnpm --filter @run-walk-coach/api prisma:generate && pnpm -r --sort lint
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @run-walk-coach/shared build && pnpm --filter @run-walk-coach/api prisma:generate && pnpm -r --sort typecheck
